attacking_style: Not an attacker. Pure leadout specialist operating in final kilometer, typically launching final leadout man between 600m-400m to go.
team_tactics: Functions as penultimate or final leadout man in structured sprint trains. Teams (FDJ, UAE) deploy him to control final kilometer positioning and deliver sprinter to optimal launch point.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint stages exclusively. Exposed on any terrain requiring sustained power or climbing. Role disappears entirely in mountain stages.
vulnerability: Timing errors lead to premature fading when deployed too early (600m+ to go). Crash risk high when fighting for position in leadout duties. Depth of team suffers significantly when unavailable.
key_patterns: Dedicated leadout domestique role across multiple teams (FDJ, UAE) and years.
Operates in final 600m, fades badly when overcommitted earlier than optimal window.
Critical enough to team sprint infrastructure that crashes/losses expose shallow depth.
form_trajectory: neutral: Still performing structured leadout duties in 2023 Giro, but role appears consistent rather than evolving across timeline
